title: descurainia incana var. incisa
intro: Descurainia incana var. incisa, also known as hoary whitetop or hoary tumble mustard, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory problems, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Descurainia incana var. incisa can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, or salves for its medicinal uses.
